name: Western Downs Battery - Stage 1 And 2
current_developer: Western Downs BESS Pty Ltd as trustee for Western Downs BESS Trust
notable: 510 MW / 1,020 MWh BESS at Chinchilla, QLD. CleanCo Queensland flagship — one of the largest batteries in the Southern Hemisphere.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2025-12 to 2025-12-19 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

eis_specs.document_title: Western Downs BESS EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Western Downs 275 kV substation (new Powerlink connection point), QLD
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~5 km of 275 kV connection to new Powerlink Western Downs 275 kV substation, near Chinchilla/Dalby, QLD.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: New Powerlink 275 kV connection in Western Downs. Substation and transmission corridor upgrades to accommodate battery plus multiple adjacent solar/wind projects (QLD CIS portfolio).
eis_specs.notes: 510 MW / 510 MWh (1-hour) BESS, Western Downs, QLD. Developer: Western Downs BESS (Origin Energy). Technology: Tesla Megapack (LFP, grid-forming). EPC: UGL (CIMIC). QLD EIS approved 2021. Commissioning 2025. Grid-forming provides virtual inertia to QLD grid. QLD LTESA contract holder. Powerlink 275 kV connection in Western Downs renewable energy cluster.

timeline_events.title: Stages 1 and 2 reach full commercial operations
timeline_events.detail: Western Downs Battery Stages 1+2 (540 MW / 1,080 MWh) fully operational. Stage 3 (305 MW / 1,220 MWh) under construction for summer 2027/28.
